side_effects.description: Persistent nausea and queasiness lasting at least 3 hours after injection, dose-dependent; 300mcg caused approximately 30% more nausea than 200mcg. Even 100mcg caused queasiness.

protocol_notes: OP was attempting a 10-day loading phase at 200mcg daily before transitioning to a weekly 1mg maintenance dose. Tried taking dose after food which helped somewhat but nausea persisted. Concerned about tolerating higher doses. Inquiring about nasal spray as alternative to reduce nausea.
